offer.title: Houston is moving to the cloud
offer.body: You believed in Houston before anyone else. Here's what moving to the cloud gives you.
offer.benefit1: Always on. Your assistants keep working, even when your computer is off.
offer.benefit2: Routines keep running on schedule, without your computer awake.
offer.benefit3: Nothing left behind. Everything you've built comes along.
offer.freeNote: It's free, and it only takes a couple of minutes.

skipConfirm.title: Start without your assistants?
skipConfirm.body: Your assistants and their conversations won't be here. Nothing is deleted, they stay safe on this computer, and you can migrate them anytime from Settings, under Cloud migration.

progress.title: Moving to the cloud
progress.phaseFiles: Packing up your files and skills
progress.keepOpen: Keep Houston open until it finishes.
progress.playCaption: While you wait, defend the galaxy.
progress.playHint: Move with the arrow keys and shoot with the space bar, or drag and tap.
progress.backingUp: Backing up your data on this computer.
progress.preparing: Getting your data ready. This can take a few minutes.
progress.startFailed: We couldn't start the move, so nothing was changed. You can try again.

game.playAgain: Tap or press space to play again

done.reconnectAiBody: Your assistants made it to the cloud. Connect your AI once to start using them.
done.reconnectAppsBody: Reconnect any apps you want now, or do it later from the Apps section.
done.leftBehindBody: These assistants didn't come along this time. Their data stays safe on this computer.
done.excludedTitle: Some larger files stayed on this computer
done.rejectedTitle: A few items couldn't come along
done.congratsBody: Your assistants are in the cloud and ready. Let's build something.
